title: Webflow Site
description: A Webflow Site object representing a website within a workspace, as returned by the GET /sites/{site_id} endpoint of the Webflow Data API v2.

workspaceId.description: Unique identifier for the Workspace that contains this Site.

shortName.description: Slugified version of the Site name.

previewUrl.description: URL of a generated screenshot image for the given Site.

timeZone.description: Site timezone set under Site Settings.

lastUpdated.description: Date the Site was last updated.

lastPublished.description: Date the Site was last published.

parentFolderId.description: The ID of the parent folder the Site exists in.

customDomains.description: A list of custom domains registered to this Site.

lastPublished.description: The date the custom domain was last published to.

locales.description: Locale configuration for the Site, including primary and secondary locales.

primary.description: The primary locale for the site.

id.description: The unique identifier for the locale.

cmsLocaleId.description: A CMS-specific identifier for the locale.

enabled.description: Indicates if the locale is enabled.

displayName.description: The display name of the locale, typically in English.

displayImageId.description: An optional ID for an image associated with the locale.

redirect.description: Determines if requests should redirect to the locale's subdirectory.

subdirectory.description: The subdirectory path for the locale, used in URLs.

tag.description: A tag or code representing the locale, following a standard format like 'en-US'.

secondary.description: A list of secondary locales available for the site.

id.description: The unique identifier for the locale.

cmsLocaleId.description: A CMS-specific identifier for the locale.

enabled.description: Indicates if the locale is enabled.

displayName.description: The display name of the locale, typically in English.

displayImageId.description: An optional ID for an image associated with the locale.

subdirectory.description: The subdirectory path for the locale, used in URLs.

tag.description: A tag or code representing the locale, following a standard format like 'en-US'.

dataCollectionEnabled.description: Indicates if data collection is enabled for the site.

dataCollectionType.description: The type of data collection enabled for the site.
